1.title: CPUUtilization
1.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization = avg(cloud.aws.rds.cpu_utilization),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization) desc
| limit 20

2.title: CPUUtilization (by Region and EngineName)
2.query:
timeseries cpu_utilization_by_region_engine_name = avg(cloud.aws.rds.cpu_utilization_by_region_engine_name),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device_group }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_group_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device_group)
| sort arrayAvg(cpu_utilization_by_region_engine_name) desc
| limit 20
